authority_basis: Taylor clarified that HoloChat rotation is worker -> deterministic Gov -> worker -> deterministic Gov.
The HoloChat patent Context Governor / STATE_OBJECT / BATON_PASS / routing / tool gating / artifact registry / state audit pattern is HC-first design authority.
Provider/API output may be worker content, advisor proposal, evidence, or advice; provider output is not Gov authority.

HoloArchitecture passed the amended law that deterministic Gov owns route continuity, selected context, memory admission, artifact pin/retrieval, tool/search authorization, relationship/voice release or repair, fallback eligibility, and visible output release/block/repair.

qa_blocker_bound.blocker: provider-backed GovernorAdapter could directly shape visible-path temperature, search, tenor/private directive, claim correction, memory writes, consolidation, and thread naming without deterministic admission

repair_summary: Provider-backed GovernorAdapter is treated as GovAdvisor proposal source in HoloChatEngine.
Deterministic HoloChat Gov Kernel now admits or repairs advisor search, private tenor/directive, claim corrections, memory updates, consolidation payloads, thread names, and visible release.
MiniMax is excluded from normal advisor eligibility and remains fallback-only.
Relationship rupture and cold/curt/scolding/gotcha/sterile patterns trigger deterministic repair before normal non-streaming visible release.
Turn-class policy escalates relationship rupture, safety, memory, persona, tool/search, conflict, and Gov uncertainty/product-critical turns to high or max.
